docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR 90 DAYS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-09-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302. MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR 90 DAYS.: NO APPEARANCE. MOTION GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR: 8620, CLERK: CARMEN LI, DEPT. 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $25,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,706.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
